predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is directly stated to be the surviving spouse of the second person.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_ascendant_relatives
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves relatives in the ascending line.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_close_collateral_relatives
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_qualifying_relatives
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves either ascendant relatives or close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: share_in_community_property_of_deceased
predicates.description: The asset is the deceased person's share in the community property.

predicates.name: share_in_exclusive_spousal_co_owned_property_of_deceased
predicates.description: The asset is the deceased person's share in property held undivided exclusively between the spouses.

predicates.name: other_asset_of_deceased_own_property
predicates.description: The asset is another asset of the deceased person's own property.

predicates.name: subject_to_statutory_return_right
predicates.description: The asset is subject to a statutory right of return.

predicates.name: contrary_provision_in_gift_deed
predicates.description: A deed of gift provides otherwise for the asset.

predicates.name: contrary_provision_in_will
predicates.description: A will provides otherwise for the asset.

predicates.name: contrary_provision_for_statutory_return_asset
predicates.description: A deed of gift or will provides otherwise for the statutory return asset.

predicates.name: receives_full_ownership_of
predicates.description: The person receives full ownership of the asset as a legal consequence.

predicates.name: receives_usufruct_of
predicates.description: The person receives usufruct of the asset as a legal consequence.
